name: Expertise
scalingSummary: 2 skills at L1, 2 more at L6
mechanicalSummary: Double proficiency bonus for chosen skills (or thieves' tools). Pick 2 at L1, 2 more at L6.
notes: Current app bug: L6 gives 1 pick instead of 2 (SYSTEMIC-2).

name: Sneak Attack
trigger: Once per turn, when you hit with an attack using a finesse or ranged weapon, and you have advantage OR an ally is within 5 ft of the target
rechargeSummary: Once per turn (not once per round)
scalingSummary: Extra damage: 1d6 at L1, +1d6 per odd level (2d6 at L3, ..., 10d6 at L19)
mechanicalSummary: Deal extra damage on a hit when conditions are met. Does not require advantage if an enemy of the target is within 5 ft of it and you don't have disadvantage.

evidence.pointer: Rogue L1: Sneak Attack; odd-level improvements; featureDescriptions; classActionsAtLevel resolves dice dynamically

notes: Per 2014 SRD: Sneak Attack is NOT an action — it's a rider on qualifying attacks.
The app has a 'Sneak strike' combat action that bundles an attack + sneak dice. This is a UI convenience, not a 2014 action.
classActionsAtLevel in ruleset.ts correctly computes sneakAttackDice = ceil(rogueLevel/2).

name: Cunning Action
mechanicalSummary: You can take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action as a bonus action on your turn.
notes: This is a classification modification: it changes Dash/Disengage/Hide from actions to also be available as bonus actions. The subclass rows for Thief (Fast Hands) and Mastermind (Master of Tactics) add additional bonus action options.
Currently descriptive-only in app.

name: Uncanny Dodge
trigger: When an attacker you can see hits you with an attack
mechanicalSummary: Use your reaction to halve the damage from an attack that hits you.

name: Evasion
mechanicalSummary: When subjected to a Dexterity save for half damage, take no damage on success and half damage on failure.
notes: Passive modification of saving throw resolution.

name: Reliable Talent
mechanicalSummary: When making an ability check that uses your proficiency bonus, treat a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.

name: Blindsense
mechanicalSummary: If able to hear, aware of the location of any hidden or invisible creature within 10 ft.

name: Slippery Mind
mechanicalSummary: Gain proficiency in Wisdom saving throws.

name: Elusive
mechanicalSummary: No attack roll has advantage against you while you aren't incapacitated.

name: Stroke of Luck
trigger: When you miss with an attack roll or fail an ability check
mechanicalSummary: When you miss with an attack, you can turn it into a hit. When you fail an ability check, treat the d20 roll as a 20. Once per short or long rest.

evidence.pointer: Rogue L20: Stroke of Luck; featureDescriptions

notes: One use that covers either attack or ability check, not both.

name: Fast Hands (Thief)
mechanicalSummary: Expands Cunning Action: can use bonus action to make Sleight of Hand check, use thieves' tools to disarm trap/open lock, or take the Use an Object action.
notes: Expands Cunning Action bonus-action options. Use an Object as bonus action is significant for magic items and consumables.

name: Second-Story Work (Thief)
mechanicalSummary: Climbing doesn't cost extra movement. Running jump distance increases by Dexterity modifier in feet.

name: Supreme Sneak (Thief)
mechanicalSummary: Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks if moving no more than half speed on the same turn.

name: Use Magic Device (Thief)
mechanicalSummary: Ignore all class, race, and level requirements on magic items.

name: Thief's Reflexes (Thief)
mechanicalSummary: Take two turns during the first round of combat: first at normal initiative, second at initiative minus 10.
notes: Cannot be used if surprised.

name: Assassinate (Assassin)
mechanicalSummary: Advantage on attacks against creatures that haven't taken a turn yet. Any hit against a surprised creature is a critical hit.
notes: Passive modification of attack resolution; the auto-crit is conditional on surprise.

name: Death Strike (Assassin)
trigger: When you hit a surprised creature with an attack
mechanicalSummary: Target makes Constitution save (DC 8 + Dex mod + PB). On failure, double the attack's damage.

name: Mage Hand Legerdemain (Arcane Trickster)
mechanicalSummary: Mage hand becomes invisible and can stow/retrieve objects, use thieves' tools at range, and perform additional pickpocket actions. Can be controlled with Cunning Action bonus action.
notes: Modifies the mage hand cantrip; adds bonus-action control option.

name: Magical Ambush (Arcane Trickster)
mechanicalSummary: If hidden when casting a spell on a creature, the target has disadvantage on any saving throw against the spell this turn.

name: Versatile Trickster (Arcane Trickster)
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, designate a creature within 5 ft of your mage hand. Gain advantage on attacks against it until end of turn.

name: Spell Thief (Arcane Trickster)
trigger: Immediately after a creature casts a spell that targets you or includes you in its area
mechanicalSummary: Force the caster to make a save using its spellcasting ability vs your spell DC. On failure, you steal the spell: the caster loses the slot and you can cast the spell using your slots for 8 hours.
notes: 1/long rest.

name: Eye for Detail (Inquisitive)
mechanicalSummary: Use a bonus action to make a Perception check to spot hidden creatures/objects or an Investigation check to uncover clues.
notes: Essentially allows Search as a bonus action in specific contexts.

name: Insightful Fighting (Inquisitive)
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, make contested Insight vs Deception check against a creature. On success, can use Sneak Attack against it for 1 minute without advantage or ally proximity.
notes: Alternative Sneak Attack enabler.

name: Unerring Eye (Inquisitive)
mechanicalSummary: As an action, sense illusions, shapechangers, and deception magic within 30 ft if not blinded or deafened.

name: Eye for Weakness (Inquisitive)
mechanicalSummary: Sneak Attack damage against the Insightful Fighting target increases by 3d6.
notes: Passive damage boost on top of normal Sneak Attack.

name: Master of Tactics (Mastermind)
mechanicalSummary: Can use the Help action as a bonus action. When using Help to aid an attack, the target can be within 30 ft instead of 5 ft.
notes: Help as bonus action + range extension.

name: Misdirection (Mastermind)
trigger: When you are targeted by an attack while a creature within 5 ft is granting you cover
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to have the attack target the creature granting you cover instead of you.

name: Skirmisher (Scout)
trigger: When an enemy ends its turn within 5 ft of you
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to move up to half your speed. This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.

name: Ambush Master (Scout)
mechanicalSummary: Advantage on initiative rolls. First creature you hit in round 1 grants advantage to all attackers against it until start of your next turn.

name: Sudden Strike (Scout)
trigger: When you take the Attack action
mechanicalSummary: Make one additional attack as a bonus action. This can benefit from Sneak Attack even if already used this turn (but must target a different creature).
notes: Allows double Sneak Attack per turn (against different targets). Significant damage multiplier.

name: Fancy Footwork (Swashbuckler)
mechanicalSummary: During your turn, if you make a melee attack against a creature, that creature can't make opportunity attacks against you for the rest of the turn.
notes: Effectively Disengage vs attacked targets — built-in hit-and-run.

name: Rakish Audacity (Swashbuckler)
mechanicalSummary: Add Charisma modifier to initiative. Can Sneak Attack without advantage if no other creatures are within 5 ft of you and you don't have disadvantage.
notes: Alternative Sneak Attack enabler — works in 1v1 duels.

name: Panache (Swashbuckler)
mechanicalSummary: As an action, make contested Charisma (Persuasion) vs Wisdom (Insight). Hostile target on failure: disadvantage on attacks vs others, can't OA others, for 1 minute. Non-hostile: charmed.
notes: Non-magical taunt/charm.

name: Master Duelist (Swashbuckler)
trigger: When you miss with an attack roll
mechanicalSummary: Reroll a missed attack with advantage. Once per short/long rest.

name: Wails from the Grave (Phantom)
trigger: Immediately after dealing Sneak Attack damage
scalingSummary: Uses = PB; damage = half Sneak Attack dice (round up) to second target
mechanicalSummary: After Sneak Attack, deal necrotic damage equal to half your SA dice to a second creature within 30 ft of the first.

evidence.pointer: phantom L3: Wails from the Grave

notes: At L17 (Death's Friend), deals damage to both first and second creature.

name: Tokens of the Departed (Phantom)
trigger: When a creature within 30 ft dies
rechargeSummary: Create soul trinket as reaction; max PB trinkets at once
mechanicalSummary: When a creature dies within 30 ft, use reaction to create a soul trinket. Trinkets can add a die to death/Con saves (destroying the trinket), fuel Wails from the Grave without spending its use, or let you ask the spirit one question.

evidence.pointer: phantom L9: Tokens of the Departed

notes: Reaction trigger; trinkets are a consumable resource.

name: Ghost Walk (Phantom)
rechargeSummary: Long rest (or expend a soul trinket to use again)
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, assume spectral form. Fly speed 10 ft (hover), attacks have disadvantage against you, can move through creatures/objects as difficult terrain (1d10 force damage if ending turn inside). Lasts until end of turn or bonus action dismiss.

name: Psychic Blades (Soulknife)
scalingSummary: Manifest psychic blades as part of Attack action; 1d6 psychic + ability mod; secondary blade 1d4 as bonus action
mechanicalSummary: Whenever you take the Attack action, manifest a psychic blade (1d6 + mod psychic, 60 ft range). Can manifest a second blade as a bonus action (1d4 psychic). Blades vanish after hit or miss.
notes: Bonus-action attack with second blade functions like two-weapon fighting but uses psychic damage and full ability mod to damage.

name: Psi-Bolstered Knack (Soulknife)
trigger: When you fail an ability check using a skill or tool you're proficient with
resourceCostSummary: 1 Psionic Energy die (only expended if check succeeds)
scalingSummary: Die: d6 at L3, d8 at L5, d10 at L11, d12 at L17
mechanicalSummary: Roll a Psionic Energy die and add to the check. Die only expended if the roll turns failure to success.
notes: Risk-free attempt — die only spent on success.

name: Psychic Teleportation (Soulknife)
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, manifest a psychic blade and throw it to an unoccupied space up to 10× the die roll in feet. Teleport to that space.

name: Psychic Veil (Soulknife)
resourceCostSummary: 1 use (free once per long rest; additional uses cost 1 Psionic Energy die)
rechargeSummary: One free use per long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action, become invisible for 1 hour or until dismissed. Ends early on dealing damage or forcing a saving throw.

name: Rend Mind (Soulknife)
trigger: When using Psychic Blades to deal Sneak Attack damage
resourceCostSummary: 1 use (free once per long rest; additional uses cost 3 Psionic Energy dice)
rechargeSummary: One free use per long rest
mechanicalSummary: Target makes Wisdom save or be stunned for 1 minute. Repeats save at end of each turn. Once free per long rest; subsequent uses cost 3 dice.
notes: Stun is a powerful condition; expensive to use repeatedly.
